one thing I found comforting over the years of trauma and mental illness when the cycles of depression and anxiety seem endless is knowing that it's all a spiral, not a circle. you aren't falling into the same hole, you learned something from the previous time
and then I think that with every time I fall into the depths, if I only come out a little stronger on the other side, the next time I'll be on a different level of the spiral, going upwards

today I'm looking back on so many times I fell and then came out just a little stronger, and how it all brought me to where I'm here, getting to go through a new and unexplored level of this spiral, and I'm filled with gratitude and appreciation for myself who didn't give up

I have to vote with my attention, and reality has to win
